description_long: This is a classic red fire hydrant with a cylindrical body and a domed top, featuring a central vertical stem and two prominent side outlets for hose connections. The hydrant is painted in a weathered red color, with visible black scuff marks and signs of wear, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. Each side outlet is capped and secured with a short metal chain, preventing the caps from being lost when removed. The top of the hydrant has a raised operating nut, used for opening the valve to release water. The base is wide and circular, designed to provide stability when mounted on the ground. No manufacturer or model markings are visible on the surface.
description: A weathered red fire hydrant with two side outlets, chained caps, and a domed top with an operating nut. The surface shows black scuff marks and signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: This view shows the hydrant from an angle, highlighting one side outlet with its chained cap and the domed top.
description_view_1: The front view displays both side outlets, each with a chained cap, and the central operating nut on top.
description_view_2: This side view focuses on the opposite outlet, showing the chain and cap, with the cylindrical body and base clearly visible.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the hydrant, both side outlets, and the full width of the base, with no additional features.
